_description: Maps Cipher-tube controls to NIST 800-53 Rev. 5 security and privacy control families. Each entry identifies the implementing component, evidence artifacts, and current assessment status.

controls.title: Policy and Procedures
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Governance engine enforces RBAC/ABAC via OPA Rego policies. Trust tiers T0–T4 define role-based permissions. CONTRIBUTING.md and SECURITY.md document access procedures.

controls.title: Account Management
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Contributor accounts managed via GitHub org membership. Trust-tier promotions require T4 approval. Automated agents use Ed25519 scoped tokens with TTL. Kill-switch revocation available to T3+.

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Deny-by-default OPA policies enforce access at the Tube Layer boundary. Cross-pillar calls validate caller trust tier. Automated agents restricted to permitted action set.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Trust tiers enforce minimum necessary permissions. Automated agents scoped to single pillar. No wildcard permissions in policy files (enforced by Safer-Tube checklist). Cross-pillar grants require T4 approval.

controls.title: Remote Access
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: All inter-pillar communication requires mTLS. TLS 1.3 enforced for transit encryption. No fallback to TLS 1.2 without explicit justification and Sentinel review.

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: All security-relevant actions emit structured audit events to the tamper-evident hash-chain ledger. Agent actions logged with Ed25519 identity. Audit events include timestamp, actor, action, target, and outcome.

controls.title: Content of Audit Records
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Audit records contain: event type, timestamp, source identity (Ed25519 signed), action performed, target resource, outcome, and hash-chain linkage. PII/secrets excluded from logs.

controls.title: Non-Repudiation
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Hash-chain audit ledger provides tamper-evident, append-only record of all security actions. Each entry cryptographically linked to its predecessor. Integrity verified by CI pipeline.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: CI pipelines run SAST, SCA, secret detection, and policy validation on every PR. Automated agents undergo quarterly drift detection. Performance benchmarks tracked continuously.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Infrastructure defined as code via Docker Compose and Makefiles. Governance policies version-controlled in governance/policies/. Performance baselines stored in benchmarks/baseline.json.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Contributors authenticate via GitHub identity. Commits require GPG/SSH signatures. Automated agents authenticate via Ed25519-signed identity tokens with TTL expiry.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Ed25519 keys rotated per Sentinel policy. mTLS certificates managed via Tube Layer with automated rotation. No hardcoded credentials (enforced by secret detection).

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Automated SAST (CodeQL, Semgrep), SCA (npm/pip/cargo audit), and secret detection (detect-secrets, TruffleHog) on every PR. Dependency scanning via Dependabot/Renovate for continuous monitoring.
evidence: CI scan results, SARIF uploads to GitHub Security tab

controls.title: Developer Testing and Evaluation
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: 80% minimum line coverage for new code. Unit, integration, and policy tests required. Performance regression tests with baseline comparison. Accessibility audits with WCAG 2.2 AA threshold.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: All inter-pillar communication encrypted via mTLS with TLS 1.3. Message integrity verified via hash-chain. Certificate pinning between pillars.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Ed25519 keys for identity. AES-256-GCM for data at rest. Key material stored in designated secrets manager, never in repositories. Rotation enforced by Sentinel agent.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: AES-256-GCM encryption for all data at rest. Key management via secrets manager. PII/PHI masked in logs and telemetry.

controls.title: Flaw Remediation
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: SECURITY.md defines SLAs: Critical ≤7 days, High ≤14 days, Medium ≤30 days, Low next release. Incident response process with 4 phases. Post-incident review mandatory.

controls.title: Information Input Validation
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: All external inputs validated and sanitized into DATACONTEXT. No external data in SYSTEMINSTRUCTION paths. Parameterized queries enforced. Rate limiting on API endpoints.
evidence: Safer-Tube checklist items: inputvalidation, nosysteminstructioninjection, parameterized_queries

controls.title: Controls and Processes
controls.ciphertubeimplementation: Approved dependency allowlist (governance/allowed-deps.json). Blocked packages with CVE justification. Lock file integrity verification. License compliance scanning. Quarterly dependency review.
